tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: After Years Living in Her Car, an 82-Year-Old Gets Her Dream Home
stories.summary: An elderly woman who lost her home to a fallen tree and lived in her car for years finally moves into a brand-new farmhouse built by the community.

stories.headline: Brain Chip Gives a Woman Silenced by Disease a Way to Speak Again
stories.summary: Gunner and Kohen, both 13, spotted an elderly neighbor trapped in her yard for over 16 hours and called for help, likely saving her life.

stories.headline: Harry Souttar Defies the Odds Again—After Two Achilles Ruptures, He Captains Australia at the World Cup
stories.summary: Australian defender returns from a devastating 15-month injury and a second rupture to deliver a dominant World Cup performance and lead his team to victory.

stories.headline: Two 13-Year-Old Cyclists Spot an Elderly Neighbor Trapped on the Ground and Save Her Life
stories.summary: A Michigan woman regains her voice through Paradromics' Connexus brain-computer interface, which uses 421 platinum-iridium microwires thinner than half a human hair.

stories.headline: A Four-Year-Old's Lemonade Stand Raises $7,500 for the Shelter That Once Helped Her Family
stories.summary: A four-year-old's lemonade stand raises $7,500 for the shelter that once helped her family, doubling her goal and showing gratitude grow into giving back.

stories.headline: Barbers Stop Mid-Haircut to Fix a Stranger's Wheelchair—Quietly Restoring Faith
stories.summary: Kelowna barbers pause their work to repair a senior's broken wheelchair tire, proving that small acts of kindness still matter deeply.

stories.headline: Europe's Largest Vulture Returns to Bulgaria After 33 Years—Chicks Hatch in the Wild
stories.summary: Three pairs of reintroduced Cinereous Vultures successfully raise chicks in Bulgaria's mountains, ending three decades of absence for this keystone species.

stories.headline: Thirty-Two High School Volleyball Players Clean Up a Century-Old Farm After Tornado
stories.summary: A team of teenagers arrives at dawn to clear debris from a family farm ravaged by tornado, turning their practice into purpose.

stories.headline: Scientists Built a Solar-Powered 'Living' Leaf That Turns Sunlight Into Clean Fuel
stories.summary: Cambridge researchers created an artificial leaf using organic semiconductors that continuously converts sunlight and carbon dioxide into fuel with near-perfect efficiency.

stories.headline: Nearly 2,000 Sea Turtle Nests Protected—191,000 Hatchlings Released Into the Ocean
stories.summary: Tamil Nadu's Marine Elite Force protects nearly 2,000 sea turtle nests and releases 191,000 hatchlings into the ocean, continuing an ancient journey.

stories.headline: Three New Chicks Hatch—Rajasthan's Critically Endangered Bustard Population Hits 94
stories.summary: Rajasthan's Great Indian Bustard population reaches 94 with three new chicks hatching, including two through artificial insemination, offering hope for one of Earth's most endangered birds.

stories.headline: Engineered Vesicles Restore the Duchenne Gene and Give Muscles Back Their Strength
stories.summary: UT MD Anderson scientists engineered natural delivery particles that restore the Duchenne muscular dystrophy gene and dramatically improve muscle function without side effects.

stories.headline: The World's Largest Pure Hydrogen Engine Powers a National Grid—Clean Energy Is Here
stories.summary: Wärtsilä's 31H2 engine just made history by running a national grid on pure hydrogen, proving clean energy is now reality.
